blocks.text: MacIntyre leads Masters warm-up — Åberg two shots back at Valero
🏎️ 07:00 — Japanese Grand Prix at Suzuka, Round 3 — tight early season championship battle
Lewandowski's late winner sent Barça past Atlético yesterday; Real Madrid stumbled at Mallorca. European football's biggest week arrives with La Liga's two giants in sharply contrasting form.

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League Quarter-Finals
items: Tue 21:00 — Real Madrid vs Bayern Munich ★★★★★
